serviceNotes.engine oil: S58 M engine: M service plans use shorter oil intervals than standard 3 Series (commonly 15,000 km / 12 months EU). Track use warrants 10,000 km changes.
serviceNotes.micro filter: Cabin filter per M maintenance schedule.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24 months; track use may require more frequent bleeding.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: High-output intake path; replace per CBS / inspection (~60,000 km planning).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: S58 M twin-turbo I6: six spark plugs 60,000 km MFR per BMW M3 (G80) maintenance schedule.
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Inspect at least every 20,000 km or before track days.
serviceNotes.check rear brake pads: Inspect every 20,000 km or with front service.
serviceNotes.vehicle check: M-specific inspection intervals are shorter than standard G20.
serviceNotes.ZF8 gearbox fluid: M Steptronic (8-speed torque-converter): preventive fluid ~60,000 km is prudent despite lifetime-fill claims.
serviceNotes.manual gearbox fluid: Six-speed manual: gear oil ~60,000 km under M use.
serviceNotes.differential fluids: M xDrive and rear LSD: fresh fluid ~60,000 km is a common M specialist recommendation.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: High thermal load turbo engine; preventive coolant service ~100,000 km.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: S58 DI: intake valve deposits; inspect/clean from ~80,000 km if rough idle or power loss.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW M3 (G80/G81) owner's manual / M service literature — 15,000 km / 12 months oil service EU maximum; SIB B000214 where applicable to M CBS
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW M3 (G80) owner's manual — cabin microfilter per M CBS (~30,000 km with 15k oil rhythm)
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW M3 (G80) owner's manual — brake fluid every 24 months; track use more frequent
serviceSources.air cleaner element: BMW M3 G80 maintenance literature — engine air filter 60,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.spark plugs: BMW M3 S58 maintenance literature — spark plug renewal 60,000 km service interval
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW M3 (G80) service literature — inspect front pads at least every 20,000 km
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW M3 (G80) service literature — inspect rear pads at least every 20,000 km
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW M3 (G80) service display / M inspection — vehicle check 30,000 km (2 × 15,000 km oil interval)
